mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spots ( experience, name, lat, lng, external_place_code, external_place_name, region ) VALUES ( #{experience}, #{name}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{externalPlaceCode}, #{externalPlaceName}, #{region} )
mapper.update: UPDATE spots SET lat = #{lat}, lng = #{lng}, external_place_code = #{externalPlaceCode}, external_place_name = #{externalPlaceName}, region = #{region}, active = 1 WHERE experience = #{experience} AND name = #{name}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO spots ( experience, name, lat, lng, external_place_code, external_place_name, region ) VALUES
( #{spot.experience}, #{spot.name}, #{spot.lat}, #{spot.lng}, #{spot.externalPlaceCode}, #{spot.externalPlaceName}, #{spot.region} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lat = VALUES(lat), lng = VALUES(lng), external_place_code = VALUES(external_place_code), external_place_name = VALUES(external_place_name), region = VALUES(region), active = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT id AS spotId, experience, name FROM spots WHERE (experience, name) IN
(#{spot.experience}, #{spot.name})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO marine_forecasts ( spot_id, experience, forecast_date, time_slot, total_index, weather, tide, variant_key, metrics, raw_data ) VALUES ( #{spotId}, #{experience}, #{forecastDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{totalIndex}, #{weather}, #{tide}, #{variantKey}, #{metricsJson}, #{rawDataJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_index = VALUES(total_index), weather = VALUES(weather), tide = VALUES(tide), metrics = VALUES(metrics), raw_data = VALUES(raw_data)

INSERT INTO marine_forecasts ( spot_id, experience, forecast_date, time_slot, total_index, weather, tide, variant_key, metrics, raw_data ) VALUES
( #{forecast.spotId}, #{forecast.experience}, #{forecast.forecastDate}, #{forecast.timeSlot}, #{forecast.totalIndex}, #{forecast.weather}, #{forecast.tide}, #{forecast.variantKey}, #{forecast.metricsJson}, #{forecast.rawDataJson} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_index = VALUES(total_index), weather = VALUES(weather), tide = VALUES(tide), metrics = VALUES(metrics), raw_data = VALUES(raw_data)
